hero_p: Over 25 years of experience in metal casting and radiological shielding production. We execute custom orders for the nuclear industry, medicine and laboratories.
about_p1: PROSZ-MET Sp. z o.o. is a Polish industrial enterprise based in Trzebinia (Lesser Poland), operating since 2001. The company stems from long metallurgical traditions and continuously develops its competencies.
about_p2: We specialise in zinc and lead casting, production of radiological shielding, and advanced machining. We hold the ISO 9001 certificate and are open to executing individual, non-standard orders.
offer_card1_p: We specialise in precision casting of zinc and lead. We fulfil both serial and individual orders in accordance with customer technical documentation.
offer_card2_p: We design and produce comprehensive lead radiological shielding – containers, bricks, shaped elements and custom parts for X-ray rooms, nuclear medicine and the nuclear industry.
offer_card3_p: We carry out precision turning, milling and grinding of metal components on modern CNC and conventional machines.
offer_card4_p: We produce lead anodes for the electrochemical industry and lead ballasts for marine, industrial and specialist applications.
offer_card5_p: We manufacture shielding containers for nuclear technology, containers for radiopharmaceuticals and radioactive waste baskets.
offer_card6_p: We execute individual projects to customer specifications. Technical consultations and material selection included. Prototypes and small series.
projects_p: Below we present selected projects completed for clients from Poland and abroad. Each realisation combines engineering precision and experience.
project1_desc: A complete shielding set for a radiation detector. The set includes a transport trolley, positioning table and lead shielding housing. Project completed for a nuclear medicine client.
project2_desc: Lead bricks with dovetail joints ensuring tight protective partitions. Used in the nuclear industry, medicine and laboratories. Available in full range: base, middle, top, corner and half bricks.
project3_desc: Precisely manufactured lead sieve dedicated for use in a reactor. Project executed according to strict client technical documentation from the nuclear energy sector.
project4_desc: Lead elements in the form of plates and shields for a linear accelerator. Individual execution with full documentation – the project meets radiation standard requirements.
project5_desc: Container measuring 530×530 mm and 250 mm high with stainless steel housing, lined with 6 mm lead sheet. Dedicated for storage of radioactive substances.
project6_desc: Containers for radiopharmaceuticals used in medical diagnostics. Medicinal products used for diagnostic purposes require special radiological protection provided by our containers.
project7_desc: Mobile lead screens and shields to protect medical and laboratory personnel from radiation. Designed with emphasis on ease of use and protection effectiveness.
project8_desc: Specialist baskets and containers for safe storage and transport of radioactive waste. Manufactured in accordance with nuclear safety standards.
project9_desc: Lead anodes manufactured for the electrochemical and marine industry. The picture shows a vessel after refit, during which anodes produced by Prosz-Met were installed.
bricks_desc: Our bricks are available in a full range of types and sizes. Production of non-standard dimension bricks is also possible – please contact our Sales Department.

footer_about_p: Specialist metal processing, zinc and lead casting, radiological shielding production. Trzebinia, Lesser Poland.
